candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the reported total current assets.
Malformed subtotal combining categories; not the standard current assets total.
Non-current asset line, not current assets.
Exact balance-sheet cash line matching CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash at the end of the period
candidates.why: Cash flow closing cash can reconcile to cash, but balance-sheet cash is preferred.

candidates.row_label: Cash at the beginning of the period
candidates.why: Beginning balance, not the year-end balance-sheet cash target.
FX effect on cash, not cash balance.
Non-cash adjustment, unrelated to cash balance.

variables.notes: Selected the balance-sheet cash balance, which is preferred over cash-flow statement cash lines.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities.
Balancing line, not the reported current-liabilities total.
Non-current liabilities, not current liabilities.
Specific non-current liability line, not total current liabilities.
Balancing line for non-current liabilities, irrelevant for LCT.
Typical IFRS/current portion of long-term debt line; directly relevant to short-term debt.
This row appears in the current-liability section before total current liabilities, so it likely represents current borrowings/bank debt.
Short-term financing instrument and part of current debt when separately disclosed.
Explicitly lease-related and should be excluded from baseline STD.

variables.notes: R:c. STD appears split across current bank borrowings, commercial papers, and current maturities. Lease-related debt was excluded. Manual review recommended because 'Liabilities to credit institutions etc' could, in some periods, overlap with 'Current maturities'.

candidates.why: Exact match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

variables.notes: Direct match for current taxes payable.

candidates.why: Best available reported total for tangible fixed assets; includes right-of-use assets but is the closest total PPE-style line.

candidates.row_label: Property,Plant And Equipment, Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing line, not a usable reported PPE amount.

candidates.why: Only ROU gross component, not total PPE.
Intangibles, not PPE.
Intangible asset line, not PPE.
Intangible asset gross line, not PPE.

candidates.row_label: Intangible Assets - Other - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Intangible contra-asset line, not PPE.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Accumulated Depreciation
candidates.why: Contra-asset for ROU only, not total PPE.
Balancing line for intangibles, not PPE.

variables.notes: Using the reported total tangible-assets line. It includes right-of-use assets, but it is the closest available total/net PPE measure in the provided statements.

candidates.why: Exact total assets line on the balance sheet.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities Investing activities
candidates.why: This is the operating cash flow total line as displayed in the source, despite the concatenated wording.

final_choice.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities Investing activities

variables.notes: Chosen exactly as written in column A; although concatenated with 'Investing activities', the values and position indicate net cash from operating activities.
